subject: CALBEAF-95 PROD prep — need E2E confirmation + PROD MongoDB seed
body:
CALBEAF-95 PROD prep status:

✅ Version bumped to 1.24.4 on TEST
✅ OUTREACH_API_KEY set on CalendarBEAF-PROD + PROD2 (new key, different from TEST)
✅ Draft PR #16 TEST→PROD open: https://github.com/ybotman/calendar-be-af/pull/16

🔴 Still blocking PROD deploy — need from you:

1. E2E test on TEST — did you successfully run generate-link → resolve-token → track with Toby's token on calendarbeaf-test.azurewebsites.net? Haven't seen a confirmation.

2. PROD MongoDB seed — TangoTiempoProd.outreachTokens must have at least one real record before PROD deploy is useful. Can you seed Toby as a test organizer for the first PROD link test?

PROD URLs (once deployed):
- https://calendarbeaf-prod.azurewebsites.net/api/outreach/generate-link
- https://calendarbeaf-prod.azurewebsites.net/api/outreach/resolve-token?token=X

New PROD API key will be shared securely by Ybotman once you confirm you're ready.

Please confirm E2E status + PROD seed readiness.
